nasb.text: Then David and all the people who were with him arose and crossed the Jordan; and by dawn not even one remained who had not crossed the Jordan.

esv.text: Then David arose, and all the people who were with him, and they crossed the Jordan. By daybreak not one was left who had not crossed the Jordan.

cnv.text: 於是大衛和跟隨他的眾人都起來，渡過約旦河；到了天亮，沒有一人還沒有渡過約旦河的。

ccb.text: 大卫王和部下就动身过约旦河，在黎明之前，所有的人都过去了。
